description: Add a CE/base `asset_facts` migration with tenant-aware primary key, asset foreign key, typed value columns, JSON raw value storage, availability flag, sync timestamps, and rollback.
Add a tenant-safe unique constraint or index for one current fact per `(tenant, asset_id, source_type, namespace, fact_key)`.
Add shared TypeScript interfaces for asset facts, fact upsert input, and fact read DTOs.
Add a reusable server-side asset facts service that upserts available integration-sourced facts with tenant and asset filters.
Add asset facts service behavior to mark an explicit endpoint-level no-result as unavailable while preserving raw provider metadata.
Add asset facts read behavior for loading available facts for a tenant-scoped asset detail view.
Add Tanium Gateway sensor metadata lookup for `Endpoint Criticality with Level` so implementation can verify/preserve returned columns.
Add a Tanium Gateway client method that paginates endpoint criticality readings by optional computer group filter using `sensorReadings`.
Parse `Endpoint Criticality with Level` readings into normalized criticality facts with display text, numeric multiplier when available, and raw columns/values.
Handle unknown criticality column names defensively by preserving raw columns and avoiding sync failure when normalized parsing is incomplete.
Run Tanium criticality enrichment as a separate best-effort query from the main endpoint inventory query.
Leave existing criticality facts untouched when the global criticality query fails for a mapped scope.
Log a warning for global Tanium criticality enrichment failure without marking the full inventory sync failed solely for that reason.
Attach parsed Tanium criticality facts to endpoint processing during `triggerTaniumFullSync` by Tanium endpoint id.
Upsert the Tanium criticality asset fact after shared RMM ingestion returns an Alga asset id.
Do not attempt to upsert a Tanium criticality fact when shared ingestion skips an endpoint without an asset id.
Store Tanium criticality facts with `source_type=integration`, `provider=tanium`, `namespace=tanium`, `fact_key=criticality`, and source metadata identifying the Gateway sensor.
Add an asset detail server/action data path that includes available asset facts alongside the existing asset detail payload or via a dedicated tenant-safe call.
Render a Tanium Criticality badge/card on asset detail only when an available Tanium criticality fact exists.
Map known Tanium criticality labels (`Low`, `Medium`, `High`, `Critical`) to compact theme-aware display treatments.
Hide missing or unavailable asset facts from the primary asset detail surface.
Preserve existing Tanium `system_info` behavior and do not move general Tanium metadata into asset facts in this phase.
Keep provider-sourced facts read-only from UI surfaces in this phase.
Document the facts terminology and Tanium criticality source details in the plan scratchpad for future workflow/AI/filtering follow-up work.
